reviews.comment:
Como toda ypf ingresas a cargar combustible una vez finalizado el playero te deja ahí esperando la desconexión de la manguera y guardarla mientras tanto se queda hablando con otro playero oh mirando el celular hasta que uno se tiene que llamar reiterada a veces eso pasa en todas las ypf

(Translated by Google)
Like at every YPF station, you go in to fill up, and once you're finished, the attendant leaves you there waiting for them to disconnect the hose and put it away. Meanwhile, he keeps talking to another attendant or looking at his cell phone until you have to call him repeatedly. Sometimes that happens at all YPF stations.

reviewReply.comment: Lamentamos Facundo que no tuvieras una buena experiencia el día de tu visita. Trabajaremos para mejorar lo observado. Saludos!
